name: Suzan DelBene
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $686,855 for Suzan DelBene in U.S. House, WA-01. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
